milestones.title: Lifts head when on tummy
milestones.description: Baby can briefly lift head while lying on stomach

milestones.title: Holds head steady without support
milestones.description: Can hold head up steadily when held upright

milestones.title: Pushes up on arms during tummy time
milestones.description: Uses arms to push chest up during tummy time

milestones.title: Rolls from tummy to back
milestones.description: Can roll over from stomach to back

milestones.title: Rolls from back to tummy
milestones.description: Can roll over from back to stomach

milestones.title: Sits without support for several seconds
milestones.description: Can sit independently for short periods

milestones.title: Pushes up on straight arms during tummy time
milestones.description: Arms fully extended during tummy time

milestones.title: Sits without support
milestones.description: Can sit independently for extended periods

milestones.title: Gets into sitting position independently
milestones.description: Can move from lying down to sitting

milestones.title: Crawls
milestones.description: Moves forward on hands and knees

milestones.title: Pulls to stand
milestones.description: Uses furniture to pull self to standing

milestones.title: Walks holding onto furniture (cruising)
milestones.description: Takes steps while holding onto furniture

milestones.title: Stands alone
milestones.description: Can stand without support briefly

milestones.title: Takes a few independent steps
milestones.description: Walks a few steps without holding onto anything

milestones.title: Walks independently
milestones.description: Walks well without assistance

milestones.title: Runs
milestones.description: Can run, though may be unsteady

milestones.title: Kicks a ball
milestones.description: Can kick a ball forward

milestones.title: Climbs on furniture
milestones.description: Climbs onto and off furniture without help

milestones.title: Opens and closes hands
milestones.description: Opens and closes hands voluntarily

milestones.title: Brings hands to mouth
milestones.description: Brings hands to mouth intentionally

milestones.title: Reaches for toys
milestones.description: Reaches toward objects of interest

milestones.title: Reaches for and grabs nearby objects
milestones.description: Successfully grabs objects within reach

milestones.title: Transfers objects between hands
milestones.description: Passes toys from one hand to the other

milestones.title: Uses raking grasp
milestones.description: Uses fingers in a raking motion to grab small items

milestones.title: Picks up small objects with pincer grasp
milestones.description: Uses thumb and finger to pick up small items

milestones.title: Bangs two objects together
milestones.description: Holds one object in each hand and bangs them

milestones.title: Points with index finger
milestones.description: Uses index finger to point at things

milestones.title: Stacks blocks
milestones.description: Can stack 2-4 blocks on top of each other

milestones.title: Scribbles with crayon
milestones.description: Makes marks on paper with crayon

milestones.title: Turns pages in a book
milestones.description: Turns board book pages one at a time

milestones.title: Watches faces intently
milestones.description: Shows interest in looking at faces

milestones.title: Follows moving objects with eyes
milestones.description: Tracks objects that move side to side

milestones.title: Recognizes familiar faces
milestones.description: Shows recognition of parents and caregivers

milestones.title: Responds to affection
milestones.description: Responds positively to cuddling and holding

milestones.title: Shows curiosity about surroundings
milestones.description: Looks around and explores environment visually

milestones.title: Mouths objects to explore
milestones.description: Puts objects in mouth to learn about them

milestones.title: Looks for partially hidden objects
milestones.description: Searches for toys that are partially covered

milestones.title: Understands object permanence
milestones.description: Knows objects exist even when hidden

milestones.title: Explores cause and effect
milestones.description: Enjoys dropping objects and making things happen

milestones.title: Plays simple games like peek-a-boo
milestones.description: Participates in simple interactive games

milestones.title: Follows simple one-step instructions
milestones.description: Understands and follows simple requests

milestones.title: Shows interest in pictures
milestones.description: Points to pictures in books when named

milestones.title: Knows what ordinary objects are used for
milestones.description: Understands purpose of common items like phone, cup

milestones.title: Engages in pretend play
milestones.description: Pretends to feed a doll or talk on phone

milestones.title: Sorts shapes and colors
milestones.description: Can group objects by shape or color

milestones.title: Completes simple puzzles
milestones.description: Can complete 2-3 piece puzzles

milestones.title: Makes eye contact
milestones.description: Looks at caregiver's eyes during feeding

milestones.title: First social smile
milestones.description: Smiles at people (not just reflexively)

milestones.title: Smiles spontaneously
milestones.description: Smiles often and responds to smiles

milestones.title: Enjoys playing with others
milestones.description: Shows enjoyment during interactive play

milestones.title: Laughs out loud
milestones.description: Laughs during play and interaction

milestones.title: Recognizes and responds to own name
milestones.description: Turns head when name is called

milestones.title: Shows stranger anxiety
milestones.description: May be wary or fearful of unfamiliar people

milestones.title: Has favorite toys
milestones.description: Shows preference for certain toys or objects

milestones.title: Shows separation anxiety
milestones.description: Cries when parent leaves

milestones.title: Waves bye-bye
milestones.description: Waves in response to bye-bye

milestones.title: Plays games like pat-a-cake
milestones.description: Participates in clapping games

milestones.title: Copies other's actions
milestones.description: Imitates gestures and actions of others

milestones.title: Shows affection to familiar people
milestones.description: Hugs and kisses familiar adults

milestones.title: Points to show others something interesting
milestones.description: Points to share attention

milestones.title: Plays alongside other children
milestones.description: Engages in parallel play near other kids

milestones.title: Shows defiant behavior
milestones.description: Says no and tests limits

milestones.title: Gets excited around other children
milestones.description: Shows interest and excitement near peers

milestones.title: Coos and makes gurgling sounds
milestones.description: Makes vowel sounds like 'ooh' and 'aah'

milestones.title: Turns head toward sounds
milestones.description: Responds to sounds by turning head

milestones.title: Makes different cries for different needs
milestones.description: Cries differently when hungry vs tired

milestones.title: Begins to babble
milestones.description: Makes consonant-vowel sounds like 'ba-ba'

milestones.title: Responds to own name
milestones.description: Looks when name is called

milestones.title: Makes string of babbling sounds
milestones.description: Says 'bababa' or 'mamama' strings

milestones.title: Understands 'no'
milestones.description: Responds to the word no

milestones.title: Copies sounds and gestures
milestones.description: Imitates sounds and movements

milestones.title: Says 'mama' or 'dada' with meaning
milestones.description: Uses mama/dada for correct parent

milestones.title: Uses gestures like shaking head
milestones.description: Shakes head for no or nods for yes

milestones.title: Says 1-2 words besides mama/dada
milestones.description: Uses a few meaningful words

milestones.title: Points to things they want
milestones.description: Uses pointing to communicate desires

milestones.title: Says several single words
milestones.description: Vocabulary of 5-10 words

milestones.title: Points to body parts when named
milestones.description: Can identify nose, eyes, etc. when asked

milestones.title: Says 2-word phrases
milestones.description: Combines words like 'more milk' or 'daddy go'

milestones.title: Follows simple 2-step instructions
milestones.description: Can follow 'get the ball and bring it here'

milestones.title: Uses 50+ words
milestones.description: Has vocabulary of 50 or more words

nurtureFocusContent.title: Supporting Tummy Time
nurtureFocusContent.description: Tips and techniques to make tummy time enjoyable
